pi_items.source: Web search: Mozilla documentation confirming 'mailnews.display.html_as' value 1 corresponds to 'Plain Text'.
Web search: Mozilla documentation confirming 'mail.show_headers' value 2 displays 'All' headers.
Web search: Mozilla documentation confirming 'mail.showCondensedAddresses' set to false shows the full email address instead of just the display name.
Web search: Mozilla documentation confirming 'mailnews.message_display.disable_remote_image' set to true blocks remote content and tracking pixels.
Web search: Mozilla documentation confirming 'browser.display.use_document_fonts' value 0 corresponds to 'Never' allowing messages to use other fonts.

privileged_info_summary: The environment operates on real emails sourced from the SpamAssassin public corpus. The task requires configuring 5 Thunderbird settings for anti-phishing. It has been verified that 'mailnews.display.html_as' should be 1 for Plain Text, 'mail.show_headers' should be 2 to expose all headers, 'mail.showCondensedAddresses' should be false to display full email addresses, 'mailnews.message_display.disable_remote_image' should be true to block remote content, and 'browser.display.use_document_fonts' should be 0 to disable custom document fonts.
